name: Button
description: Glossy aqua actions with seven variants and a tactile press.

name: Badge
description: Compact status pills, from glossy primary to soft intents.

name: Input
description: A recessed glass text field with an aqua focus ring.

name: Textarea
description: Multi-line input matching the recessed field style.

name: Label
description: An accessible, selectable form label.

name: Checkbox
description: A recessed tile that fills with a glossy aqua check.

name: Radio Group
description: Single-select circles, each lighting up with an aqua dot.

name: Switch
description: A glossy aqua toggle with a glassy thumb.

name: Slider
description: A recessed track with an aqua range and a glassy thumb.

name: Select
description: A frosted-glass dropdown with highlighted items.

name: Card
description: The signature frosted-glass surface, with a wet top sheen.

name: Alert
description: Glass callouts in four intents.

name: Separator
description: A hairline divider for sections.

name: Avatar
description: A rounded image with a graceful fallback.

name: Dialog
description: A glass modal floating over a blurred scrim.

name: Popover
description: A floating glass panel anchored to a trigger.

name: Tooltip
description: A small hint shown on hover or focus.

name: Tabs
description: A segmented glass switcher with a raised active pill.

name: Accordion
description: Collapsible sections with a smooth height transition.

name: Progress
description: A recessed track with a glossy aqua fill.

name: Skeleton
description: A pulsing placeholder for loading content.

name: Spinner
description: A bright aqua loading spinner.

name: Circular Gauge
description: An animated ring gauge with an aqua glow.

name: Orb
description: A soft, blooming aqua orb for hero backdrops.

name: Bubbles
description: Rising water bubbles to overlay on glass.

name: Alert Dialog
description: A glass modal that interrupts for a confirmation.

name: Sheet
description: A glass panel that slides in from any edge.

name: Hover Card
description: A glass card revealed on hover or focus.

name: Dropdown Menu
description: A frosted menu of actions, with submenus and checks.

name: Context Menu
description: A right-click menu in frosted glass.

name: Menubar
description: A desktop-style bar of dropdown menus.

name: Navigation Menu
description: Site navigation with glass dropdown panels.

name: Command
description: A searchable command palette.

name: Combobox
description: A searchable select in frosted glass.

name: Toggle
description: A two-state button with a raised pressed look.

name: Toggle Group
description: A segmented set of toggles in a glass rail.

name: Input OTP
description: Recessed one-time-code cells.

name: Input Group
description: An input fused with leading or trailing add-ons.

name: Field
description: Label, control, hint, and error, grouped.

name: Native Select
description: A styled native select, no JS required.

name: Collapsible
description: A single open-and-close disclosure.

name: Breadcrumb
description: A path trail back to the top.

name: Pagination
description: Page-by-page navigation controls.

name: Scroll Area
description: A scroll container with a slim glass bar.

name: Aspect Ratio
description: Hold content to a fixed ratio.

name: Table
description: A clean, rounded data table.

name: Empty
description: A friendly empty state.

name: Item
description: A composable list row.

name: Kbd
description: A keyboard-key badge.

name: Button Group
description: Buttons joined into one segmented control.

name: Toast
description: Transient glass notifications that bloom in and stack.

name: Meter
description: A semantic gauge whose glossy fill shifts across thresholds.

name: Calendar
description: A glassy month grid with an aqua-gel selected day.

name: Date Picker
description: A recessed glass date field with a popover calendar.

name: Rating
description: Fillable aqua droplets for a quick, glossy score.

name: Tags Input
description: A glass field that collects entries as glossy aqua chips.

name: Carousel
description: A swipeable slider with glossy aqua prev/next controls.

name: Resizable
description: Draggable panes split by a glassy aqua handle.

name: Data Table
description: A sortable, selectable, paginated table on glass.

name: Timeline
description: A vertical history with glowing aqua markers.

name: Sidebar
description: A collapsible app sidebar that folds to a glassy rail.

name: Stepper
description: A multi-step progress trail with glossy aqua nodes.

name: Tree
description: A nested, keyboard-navigable file-style tree.

name: Ripple
description: A water ripple that blooms from every pointer press.

name: Dock
description: An Aqua-style dock that magnifies icons under the cursor.

name: Aurora
description: A slow, drifting aurora-gradient backdrop.

name: Caustics
description: Rippling pool-light caustics for any surface.

name: Lens Flare
description: A sunlit lens flare and bloom accent.

name: Liquid Divider
description: A separator that ripples like the surface of water.
